messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

  "node_id": "0131",
  "title": "即便是存量竞争时代买量仍是最主要的获客手段",

Section text:
## 即便是存量竞争时代买量仍是最主要的获客手段

message.content: This section addresses topics related to customer acquisition strategies in mature markets. It answers questions regarding the primary user acquisition channel during the "stock competition era" (存量竞争时代), presenting the core claim that paid traffic acquisition ("买量") remains the most important method for acquiring users. The provided text consists solely of this heading and contains no specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, metrics, tables, figures, or supporting evidence types. It is optimized for retrieving high-level strategic assertions about the continued dominance and necessity of paid user acquisition in saturated market conditions.
